title: Re-order Card View Fields
excerpt: I love the Card View, but currently it only shows the Main view’s fields in the order they appear in the Main view. Please allow the fields to be re-ordered, by allowing us to drag them around either in the Setup pane, o…

posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml: I love the Card View, but currently it only shows the Main view’s fields in the order they appear in the Main view. Please allow the fields to be re-ordered, by allowing us to drag them around either in the Setup pane, or on the card view itself.
